title: epilobium amplectens
intro: Epilobium amplectens, also known as the narrow-fruited willowherb or grasstile, is a perennial plant species in the onagraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Epilobium amplectens include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Epilobium amplectens can be found in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, and are often used to support urinary health and alleviate symptoms of prostatitis.
